items.title: [正面] peak lovecraftian themed card game. Very fair in t...
items.summary:
peak lovecraftian themed card game. Very fair in terms of the gacha, I've been playing for a few months now (mostly on mobile) and have all characters and savings for upcoming events easily. The game itself is basically slay the spire. Character designs are so good I feel sick of playing Hoyo games (some characters lean a bit towards ero which i don't mind, but if you're sensitive towards that I wouldn't recommend it.) 

The writing itself is actually very good for a gacha game, almost on par with Limbus company, and lacks the bloat that others like Genshin and WW have. Overall I really recommend it if you like Lovecraftian and Slay the Spire type games with an anime theme to it. 

There is a PVP mode, but it's pretty dead fyi.
